evidence.quote: Firefox Focus prioritizes user privacy by automatically blocking ads and trackers.
Enables custom GeckoView builds for Focus/Klar, emphasizing developer autonomy, flexibility in configuration, and direct integration control.
Values open collaboration and positive community contributions.
Prioritizes user privacy, security, and simplicity.
Focus employs staged public releases (Production, Beta, Nightly) to ensure stability through gradual rollouts and community testing.
